textByHash.0093e3a007c19d4e8d52b13091e4c2bbc3e06562: Don't even think about it - these dragons up here are for me!
textByHash.15df63fef350431a93e19276aa5dc36870b1891c: You wouldn't understand. If you're so interested, talk to the other people around here. They've returned from the afterlife as well!
textByHash.278863c230aa4ecd6ef699340cde041e73a0c9a6: They're useful enough for what I'm doing. Anyway, moving on...
textByHash.38d08f5e16b36aa343b202dfe9f965174ffeb53e: Well, you see, I spend the rest of the year in the afterlife. And that is quite boring.
textByHash.3bb66aa6d4e2d75618f6a2ab7b1a1e028e21a6bc: I've got wizard boots on, see? What more would I want?
textByHash.510f7b56ac3315f32a59c612b03eceaabc6aa63f: It's hot in here with all the dragonfire.
textByHash.69c3a1d3926dca4db353ac70a089dcd80e42ab60: You're back! Here to party some more?
textByHash.93dfc8bec73ce56023d40fb01455b0a7da1e1ae6: Oi, find yourself some other dragons - these are mine!
textByHash.9ea4b2798962173aa5bae8e36c108cddcbf72f7e: My cousin Slieve built the access routes through this blue dragon lair. But she's only really interested in black dragons, not blue ones, so she said I could have this area for myself.
textByHash.a76f03acaa734031d9c80594fecf3ab58d090cf1: Dragon-slaying, of course. Do I look like one of those serfs who wanders around scavenging scales off the floor? I'm just having a rest now, before I get back to the fight.
textByHash.c5ff29ed84bb7f0deb9d69e24e3603f0a74696c2: Yes. You know, where you go when you die. Anyway, that's boring stuff. Coming back here is fun!
textByHash.dcf60b65d94dcbda0230a5eb070b7cacc19aafc0: I suppose that's okay since you've got a Slayer assignment. But when you've finished it, leave the rest for me!
textByHash.f7ef989ab05c8082ad9382a47d77b0c4bb8bcb25: There's a Slayer Master in my family, so I don't stop people doing their Slayer assignments, but otherwise these dragons are for me, not you.
